description: Fix scoped npm package names in monorepo spec directory paths
changelog:
**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(init): strip npm scope prefix (@scope/name → name) from monorepo package directory names — prevents nested @scope/ directories in .spec-first/spec/ and config.yaml
notes: Run `spec-first update` to sync. If you ran `spec-first init` on a monorepo with scoped packages (e.g. @scope/name), you may need to manually rename existing `.spec-first/spec/@scope/name/` directories to `.spec-first/spec/name/` and update the keys in `.spec-first/config.yaml`.
